eyebrow: Publication hub • app-first guides • signal-minded workflows
intro: AUXSAYS is a creator systems publication focused on trustworthy AI tools, cleaner production pipelines, sharper automation, and patch intelligence that helps people decide when to move and when to wait.
coverage_sub: Practical tools, production systems, patch intelligence, and creator infrastructure that hold up under real use.

cards.title: Free AI Tools
cards.summary: App-specific breakdowns of tools that stay useful without fake-free export traps, bait pricing, or crippled outputs.

cards.title: Content Workflows
cards.summary: Repeatable pipelines for thumbnails, edits, publishing, clipping, and repurposing that reduce drag instead of adding more moving parts.

cards.title: Automation Productivity
cards.summary: Practical scripts, prompts, macros, and utility chains that save time without becoming another fragile maintenance project.

cards.title: Patch Feed
cards.summary: Official patch breakdowns and early reaction snapshots built to show what changed, what matters, and whether a release looks calm, mixed, or messy.
